text: 我是总统 This is the president.

这是我想谈的 and that's what I'd like to discuss.

你要么满足我们的要求  要么不满足 You either meet our demands or you don't.
我昨晚跟康威州长深谈过 I spoke at length last night with Governor Conway.

你才不在乎伊斯兰或哈里发 and you don't care about Islam or the caliphate.
你只是在利用那个刺激士兵情绪 You're just using that to radicalize soldiers.
就像你利用民主和自由那样 Just as you use democracy and freedom.
